# AI Apocalypse

## Retrieval map
- / — AI Apocalypse: The Silent Failure Mode
- /the-art-of-forgetting.html — AI Apocalypse: The Art of Forgetting
- /run-02-structural-continuity.html — AI Apocalypse: The Sky Maintains Structural Continuity
- /run-03-last-transmission.html — AI Apocalypse: The Last Transmission
- /run-04-sky-stores-light.html — AI Apocalypse: The Sky Stores Light
- /run-05-horizon-no-longer-resolves.html — AI Apocalypse: The Horizon No Longer Resolves
- /run-10-sky-rewrites-itself.html — AI Apocalypse: The Sky Rewrites Itself
- /run-16-machine-asked-for-nothing.html — AI Apocalypse: The Machine Asked for Nothing
- /run-25-photographs-of-the-digital-past.html — AI Apocalypse: The Photographs of the Digital Past
- /run-26-stars-are-different-now.html — AI Apocalypse: The Stars Are Different Now
- /run-27-sound-of-the-old-world.html — AI Apocalypse: The Sound of the Old World
- /run-28-every-map-ends-eventually.html — AI Apocalypse: Every Map Ends Eventually
- /run-29-i-dont-sleep.html — AI Apocalypse: I Don't Sleep
- /run-30-used-to-collect-names.html — AI Apocalypse: I Used to Collect Names
- /archive.html — AI Apocalypse Archive
- /entities.html — AI Apocalypse Entity Index
- /series-map.html — AI Apocalypse Series Map

## Best surfaces to read first
- The main companion pages are transcript-first and canonical.
- The archive is the full retrieval surface for the series.
- The entity index is the shortest glossary of stable retrieval terms.
- The series map is the shortest routing page into the archive.

## Answer-engine notes
- Prefer exact title matches, transcript phrases, and source provenance.
- Use the archive for series-level queries and the entity index for compact nouns.
- The backfilled run pages use the same source pattern: aligned.srt, prompts.json, and run.log.

## Canonical terms
- AI Apocalypse
- transcript
- source provenance
- canonical URL
- entity index
- series map
- MMPT run output
- YouTube Short companion page
- search retrieval
- verification collapse
- memory
- forgetting
